prompt_text:
### Demographics: 77-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Alzheimer's Disease
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 83.1 kg; Height 159.9 cm; BMI 32.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 113/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 9.3%; current 8.6%), FPG (12 months ago 207mg/dL; 9 months ago 175mg/dL; 6 months ago 248mg/dL; 3 months ago 233mg/dL; current 190mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 82.1kg; 9 months ago 83.3kg; 6 months ago 80.7kg; 3 months ago 81.3kg; current 83.1kg), Height (12 months ago 159.9cm; 9 months ago 159.9cm; 6 months ago 159.9cm; 3 months ago 159.9cm; current 159.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 113mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 64U/L; 9 months ago 72U/L; 6 months ago 71U/L; 3 months ago 71U/L; current 67U/L), AST (12 months ago 53U/L; 9 months ago 59U/L; 6 months ago 60U/L; 3 months ago 53U/L; current 55U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 97mL/min/1.73m²; current 94mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 36mg/g; 9 months ago 37mg/g; 6 months ago 37mg/g; 3 months ago 37mg/g; current 45mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 69mg/dL; 9 months ago 68mg/dL; 6 months ago 68mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 168mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 185mg/dL; 3 months ago 172mg/dL; current 178mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.25 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
